__comment: Sample filters configuration. Copy to filters.json and edit to match your job search criteria. Filters apply at scrape time: jobs that fail any filter are dropped before storage. Used by both the CLI and dashboard refresh.

__schema_help.scrape_filter.enabled: Master switch. false = keep everything (no filtering).
__schema_help.scrape_filter.max_age_days: Drop jobs posted more than N days ago. Workday provides 'Posted Today / Yesterday / N Days Ago'.
__schema_help.scrape_filter.location_ids: Array of location IDs (see 'locations' section). A job passes if it matches ANY ID.
__schema_help.scrape_filter.title_includes: Case-insensitive substrings. Job title must contain at least one. Empty = no requirement.
__schema_help.scrape_filter.title_excludes: Case-insensitive substrings. Job title must contain NONE. Empty = no exclusion.
__schema_help.locations[].id: Unique identifier referenced in 'location_ids' and used in CLI --location flag.
__schema_help.locations[].label: Display name shown in the dashboard's location dropdown.
__schema_help.locations[].matchAny: Case-insensitive substrings. A job's location string must contain at least one.

__cli_overrides: Override location for one run: python -m job_autopilot discover --location remote_us
Override max-age for one run:  python -m job_autopilot discover --max-age 14
Bypass all filters:            python -m job_autopilot discover --no-filter
